excel.pageSubtitle: Manage visitor invitations using Excel templates for bulk processing and offline workflow

recentActivity.title: Recent Processing Activity
recentActivity.emptyHint: Upload Excel files to see processing results here

guide.title: Excel Invitation Management Guide
guide.downloadDesc: Download Excel templates with pre-configured fields and dropdown lists. Choose between single visitor or multiple visitors per meeting.
guide.fillDesc: Complete the Excel template offline. Required fields are highlighted in red. Use dropdown lists for consistent data entry.
guide.uploadDesc: Upload completed templates for automatic processing. The system will create visitors and invitations, then provide a detailed summary.
guide.emailDesc: Send templates directly to hosts via email. Include custom messages and choose template types based on meeting requirements.
guide.practice1: Validate data before uploading (check email formats, phone numbers)
guide.practice2: Use existing visitor data when possible to avoid duplicates
guide.practice3: Review generated invitations and approve as needed
guide.practice4: Keep template files under 10MB for optimal performance

download.title: Download Invitation Templates
download.description: Download Excel templates to create invitations offline. Fill out the template and upload it back to automatically create visitors and invitations.
download.singleVisitorDesc: Template for creating one invitation with one visitor
download.multipleVisitorsDesc: Template for creating one meeting with multiple visitors
download.step2: Fill in all required fields (marked in red)
download.step3: Save the file and upload it using the Upload tab
download.step4: Review the created invitations and approve as needed

upload.title: Upload Filled Template
upload.description: Upload your completed Excel template to automatically create visitors and invitations.
upload.selectDescription: Only .xlsx files up to 10MB are accepted

email.title: Email Template to Host
email.description: Send Excel templates directly to hosts via email for offline invitation creation.
email.customMessagePlaceholder: Add a custom message to include in the email...
